subcodes.first_line: O token of divine favor! Divine grace must needs become as the effulgence of the All-Merciful, which is to say that in all conditions and characteristics one must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت لطف حق لطف الهی باید پرتو رحمانی گردد یعنی در جمیع احوال و اخلاق باید
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @being a source of light; guidance
